---
title: "Step 2 — Exploratory Data Analysis"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(knitr)

source(here("Step2", "analysis", "config.R"))

d <- readRDS(CLEANED_RDS)

outcome_vars <- c(
  "share_direct", "share_social", "read_more",
  "govtfund_general", "govtfund_cuts", "behavior_intent",
  "climate_composite"
)

outcome_labels <- c(
  share_direct      = "Share directly",
  share_social      = "Share on social media",
  read_more         = "Want to read more",
  govtfund_general  = "Govt funding attitude (general)",
  govtfund_cuts     = "Disapprove of funding cuts",
  behavior_intent   = "Behavioral intention",
  climate_composite = "Climate beliefs (composite)"
)

condition_colors <- c(control = "#888888", relevance = "#011F5B", action = "#990000")
```

## Sample

**N = `r nrow(d)`**

```{r condition-n}
d |>
  count(condition) |>
  mutate(pct = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1)) |>
  kable(col.names = c("Condition", "N", "%"))
```

```{r variant-n}
d |>
  count(condition, variant_seen) |>
  kable(col.names = c("Condition", "Variant", "N"))
```

## Means and SDs by condition

```{r means-table}
d |>
  group_by(condition) |>
  summarise(across(
    all_of(outcome_vars),
    list(M = ~round(mean(., na.rm = TRUE), 2),
         SD = ~round(sd(., na.rm = TRUE), 2)),
    .names = "{.col}__{.fn}"
  )) |>
  pivot_longer(-condition, names_to = c("variable", "stat"), names_sep = "__") |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = stat, values_from = value) |>
  mutate(variable = outcome_labels[variable]) |>
  arrange(variable) |>
  kable(col.names = c("Condition", "Outcome", "M", "SD"))
```

## Distributions by outcome

```{r distributions, fig.height=4, fig.width=8, results='asis'}
for (var in outcome_vars) {
  p <- ggplot(d, aes(x = .data[[var]], fill = condition)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 15, alpha = 0.8, position = "identity") +
    facet_wrap(~condition, ncol = 3) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = condition_colors) +
    labs(title = outcome_labels[[var]], x = NULL, y = "Count") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  print(p)
}
```

## Means plot

```{r means-plot, fig.height=7, fig.width=10}
means_df <- d |>
  group_by(condition) |>
  summarise(across(
    all_of(outcome_vars),
    list(mean = ~mean(., na.rm = TRUE),
         se   = ~sd(., na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(.))))
  ), .groups = "drop") |>
  pivot_longer(-condition, names_to = c("variable", "stat"), names_sep = "__") |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = stat, values_from = value) |>
  mutate(variable = factor(variable, levels = outcome_vars,
                           labels = outcome_labels[outcome_vars]))

ggplot(means_df, aes(x = condition, y = mean, fill = condition)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se), width = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = condition_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Mean (±1 SE)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1))
```

## Outcome correlations

```{r correlations, fig.height=6, fig.width=7}
cor_mat <- d |>
  select(all_of(outcome_vars)) |>
  cor(use = "pairwise.complete.obs") |>
  round(2)

cor_df <- as.data.frame(cor_mat) |>
  rownames_to_column("var1") |>
  pivot_longer(-var1, names_to = "var2", values_to = "r") |>
  mutate(
    var1 = factor(var1, levels = outcome_vars, labels = outcome_labels[outcome_vars]),
    var2 = factor(var2, levels = outcome_vars, labels = outcome_labels[outcome_vars])
  )

ggplot(cor_df, aes(x = var1, y = var2, fill = r)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = r), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#990000", mid = "white", high = "#011F5B",
                       midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "r") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1))
```

```{r cor-table}
as.data.frame(cor_mat) |>
  rownames_to_column("Variable") |>
  mutate(Variable = outcome_labels[Variable]) |>
  rename_with(~outcome_labels[.], -Variable) |>
  kable()
```
